top_signals.title: FedEx Freight donation revives UA Northark CDL training program
top_signals.summary:
FedEx Freight donates tractors and trailers to UA Northark to restart its CDL program this fall after an 18-month pause.

The post FedEx Freight donation revives UA Northark CDL training program appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
